title: Events for containers in pods now include the pod's ID
body:
This allows tools like Cockpit to know that the pod in question has also been updated, so they can refresh the list of containers in the pod.

Fixes #15408

```release-note
Events for containers that are part of a pod now include the ID of the pod.
```

comments.body:
LGTM
But technically this is a new feature not a bug...
The Cockpit folks labelled it as a bug :smile:

FWIW, anything can go into the main branches at this point.  If we want stuff to land in RHEL 8.7/9.0 zero day, we need to cherry pick it into the v4.2 branch.  Should that be renamed to v4.2-rhel at this point @mheon mheon?
LGTM

No rename. That branch is for upstream v4.2.x releases.

I will push a v4.2.0-rhel branch we can use for further RHEL dev.
RHEL branch created
Tests don't seem to be happy
